data.title: Analyst Reaffirms Buy on Strong Production Outlook, Resource Expansion Potential, and Large Discount to NAV
data.description:
Discovery Silver, the Basic Materials sector company, was revisited by a Wall Street analyst on April 24. Analyst Nicolas Dion from ATB Cormark Capital Markets maintained a Buy rating on the stock and has a C$15.00 price target.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nicolas Dion has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors, including production performance that aligns with expectations and a clear path to higher output through 2026 as key pits ramp up and operational optimizations continue. He also emphasizes the steady flow of encouraging drill results across the Porcupine Complex, which point to meaningful resource expansion potential at multiple deposits and support a longer mine life and stronger production profile.

In addition, Dion highlights the strategic value of recent acquisitions that add processing capacity, tailings space, and new exploration ground, all of which enhance flexibility and future growth options. He also views the large-scale Cordero project as a major long‑term driver that could justify a premium valuation once in production, while the current share price implies less than 0.5x his net asset value estimate, leaving what he sees as compelling upside for investors at today’s levels.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
